title: Tether taps Big Four firm KPMG for first financial audit of $184 billion stablecoin issuer: FT
message_html: Tether taps Big Four firm KPMG for first financial audit of $184 billion stablecoin issuer: FT ...
snippet: Tether previously relied on monthly attestations from BDO Italia, which fall short of the full audit now planned with KPMG.

title: Tether signs KPMG to execute audit of $184bn stablecoin giant
message_html: Tether signs KPMG to execute audit of $184bn stablecoin giant ...
snippet: DLNEWS: Tether signs KPMG to execute audit of $184bn stablecoin giant
